query: SELECT e.id, e.autoAcceptOrders, ps.autoPrintEnabled, ps.printOnNewOrder, ps.printOnStatusChange, ps.posPrinterEnabled, ps.posPrinterLinkcode FROM establishments e LEFT JOIN printerSettings ps ON ps.establishmentId = e.id WHERE e.id = 30001;
